title: Repeat
description: Repeat, a simple and lightweight plugin that automatically sends a custom message at regular intervals to your server.
body:
### 📢 Repeat – Automatic Announcement Plugin for Minecraft Servers
Repeat is a simple, lightweight, and fully configurable plugin designed to automatically send a custom message at regular intervals on your Minecraft server. Ideal for reminding players of rules, announcing a Discord server, promoting a shop, or disseminating any important information to them.

**Compatible with all Minecraft versions from 1.8 to 1.21+, and works perfectly on Bukkit, Spigot, Paper, Purpur, and all their variants.**

## ⚙️ Main Features
- Automatically sends a global message every 5 minutes.
- Fully customizable in-game message.
- Ability to enable or disable the announcement without restarting the server.
- Ultra-lightweight: no dependencies, no complicated configuration.
- Works on all Bukkit-based servers.

## 🛠️ Available Commands

```
🔧 /setmessage <message>
```

Modifies the automatic message sent by the plugin.

Example:
/setmessage Join our Discord: discord.gg/server_

```
/togglemessage
```

Enables or disables the automatic sending of the message. Useful for temporarily stopping announcements without disabling the plugin.

## 🔐 Permissions
- All commands are restricted to the OP to prevent abuse.
- No additional permissions are required.

## 🚀 Why Use Repeat?
- Perfect for small and large servers.
- Instant installation: simply drop it into /plugins and you're good to go.
- No complicated configuration files.
- A clean and reliable solution for automating your announcements.
